message:
feat(mcp): implement MCP server for AI agent integration

Add Model Context Protocol server (`ms mcp serve`) with stdio transport:
- JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol implementation
- Tools: search, suggest, load, evidence, list, show, doctor
- Standard MCP method handlers (initialize, tools/list, tools/call)
- Comprehensive unit tests for protocol handling

Also adds Ed25519 signature verification tests for bundle manifest.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
